context: Create crates/anvilml-server/src/artifact/store.rs: ArtifactStore{dir:PathBuf,db:SqlitePool}. pub async fn save(&self,job_id:Uuid,image_bytes:&[u8])->Result<ArtifactMeta>: sha256 hash; write to {dir}/{hash}.png; INSERT into artifacts table. pub async fn get(&self,hash:&str)->Result<Option<PathBuf>>. pub async fn list(&self,job_id:Option<Uuid>)->Result<Vec<ArtifactMeta>>. tests: save+get roundtrip, hash deterministic. cargo test -p anvilml-server --features mock-hardware exits 0 >=4 tests.

description: anvilml-scheduler: persist ImageReady artifact and update job
context: Extend scheduler.rs event handler: on WorkerEvent::ImageReady{job_id,image_b64,...}: base64 decode; call artifact_store.save(job_id,bytes); broadcast WsEvent::JobImageReady{job_id,artifact_hash,...}.
